---
title: "03_prep_data"
author: Tyler L. McIntosh
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    html-math-method: katex
    css: styles.css
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 1
    toc-title: Contents
    toc-location: right
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show the code"
---


# Setup and read in data

``` {r setupchunk}
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: 'hide'

rm(list = ls())

if(!requireNamespace("here", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("here")
}
library(here)

source(here::here("utils", "functions.R"))

install_load_packages(c(
  "tidyverse",
  "terra",
  "mapview",
  "jsonlite",
  "sf",
  "janitor",
  "data.table",
  "googledrive",
  "mblm",
  "arrow",
  "forcats",
  "tictoc",
  "data.table"))

dir_figs <- here::here('figs')
dir_derived <- here::here('data', 'derived')
dir_raw <- here::here('data', 'raw')
dir_manual <- here::here('data', 'manual')
dir_ensure(c(dir_figs,
             dir_derived,
             dir_manual,
             dir_raw))

set.seed(1234)

```

# Load data from GDrive

```{r}
##### Run to authenticate gdrive access
# drive_auth()
# ####
# 
# idb <- read_matching_csvs_from_gdrive("GEE_Exports", "fc_tile_IDBatholith")
# write_csv(idb, file = here(dir_derived, "all_IDBatholith.csv"))
# 
# nc <- read_matching_csvs_from_gdrive("GEE_Exports", "fc_tile_NCascades")
# write_csv(nc, file = here(dir_derived, "all_NCascades.csv"))
# 
# sn <- read_matching_csvs_from_gdrive("GEE_Exports", "fc_tile_SierraNevada")
# write_csv(sn, file = here(dir_derived, "all_SierraNevada.csv"))
# 
# sr <- read_matching_csvs_from_gdrive("GEE_Exports", "fc_tile_SRockies")
# write_csv(sr, file = here(dir_derived, "all_SRockies.csv"))


#There is a problem where some instances of '1's with NAs in the CBI columns can end up being treated as logical; ensure doesn't happen
read_csv_ensure_cbi_dbl <- function(path) {
  # Preview column names without reading all data
  col_names <- names(read_csv(path, n_max = 0))
  
  # Find columns that start with "CBI"
  cbi_cols <- grep("^cbi", col_names, value = TRUE)
  
  # Create a list of column specs: all CBI columns as double
  col_spec <- do.call(cols, c(
    setNames(rep(list(col_double()), length(cbi_cols)), cbi_cols),
    .default = col_guess()
  ))
  
  # Read the CSV with specified col_types
  dats <- read_csv(path, col_types = col_spec)
  
  return(dats)
}


raw_dats_fl <- here(dir_derived, "raw_test_dats.csv")

if(!file.exists(raw_dats_fl)) {
  #Use safe read function
  idb_dats <- read_csv_ensure_cbi_dbl(here(dir_derived, "all_IDBatholith.csv")) |>
    mutate(ecoregion = "Idaho Batholith")
  nc_dats <- read_csv_ensure_cbi_dbl(here(dir_derived, "all_NCascades.csv")) |>
    mutate(ecoregion = "North Cascades")
  sn_dats <- read_csv_ensure_cbi_dbl(here(dir_derived, "all_SierraNevada.csv")) |>
    mutate(ecoregion = "Sierra Nevada")
  sr_dats <- read_csv_ensure_cbi_dbl(here(dir_derived, "all_SRockies.csv")) |>
    mutate(ecoregion = "Southern Rockies")
  
  dats <- bind_rows(idb_dats, nc_dats, sn_dats, sr_dats)
  
  write_csv(dats, sink = raw_dats_fl)
}


dats <- read_csv_ensure_cbi_dbl(here(dir_derived, "raw_test_dats.csv"))



```



# Deal with fire and fire heterogeneity data

```{r}
# replace -1 signifier in CBI bands with NA
dats <- dats %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("cbi_year"), ~ na_if(.x, -1)))

# Remove all instances with re-burns and instances where biotic_sum is NA (i.e. at the very edge of AOI)
dats_no_reburn <- dats %>%
  filter(
    rowSums(!is.na(select(., starts_with("cbi_year")))) <= 1
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(biotic_sum))

# Get burn year & burn year bcCBI
# Identify CBI columns and corresponding years
cbi_cols <- grep("^cbi_year_\\d{4}$", names(dats_no_reburn), value = TRUE)
years <- as.integer(sub(".*_(\\d{4})$", "\\1", cbi_cols))

# Extract the relevant subset
cbi_matrix <- as.data.frame(dats_no_reburn[cbi_cols], stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Count non-NA values per row
non_na_counts <- rowSums(!is.na(cbi_matrix))

# Rows with exactly one non-NA value
valid_idx <- which(non_na_counts == 1)

# Get the column index (position) of the non-NA value
non_na_col_index <- max.col(!is.na(cbi_matrix[valid_idx, , drop = FALSE]), ties.method = "first")

# Initialize result columns
dats_no_reburn$burn_year <- NA_integer_
dats_no_reburn$burn_year_cbi <- NA_real_

# Assign values for valid rows only
dats_no_reburn$burn_year[valid_idx] <- years[non_na_col_index]
dats_no_reburn$burn_year_cbi[valid_idx] <- cbi_matrix[cbind(valid_idx, non_na_col_index)]

rm(cbi_matrix)


# REMOVE 'YR' and "YEAR" from names
names(dats_no_reburn) <- gsub("(_yr_|_year_)", "_", names(dats_no_reburn))

# GET THE OTHER CBI CONTEXT DATA

# Function to extract burn-year-aligned values from year-tagged columns
extract_burn_year_value <- function(df, burn_year, prefix) {
  # Get matching columns like 'cbi_1kmmwmedian_2008'
  pattern <- paste0("^", prefix, "_\\d{4}$")
  cols <- grep(pattern, names(df), value = TRUE)
  
  # Extract years from column names
  years <- as.integer(sub(".*_(\\d{4})$", "\\1", cols))
  
  # Create value matrix (rows = obs, cols = years)
  value_mat <- as.data.frame(df[cols], stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  
  # Create lookup index: for each row, match burn_year to column year
  col_index <- match(burn_year, years)
  
  # Use cbind(row, col) indexing to extract values
  result <- mapply(function(row, col) {
    if (!is.na(col)) value_mat[row, col] else NA
  }, row = seq_along(burn_year), col = col_index)
  
  return(result)
}

# Apply the function to create the new columns
dats_no_reburn$burn_cbi_1kmmwmedian <- extract_burn_year_value(
  dats_no_reburn,
  burn_year = dats_no_reburn$burn_year,
  prefix = "cbi_1kmmwmedian"
)

dats_no_reburn$burn_cbi_1kmmwstd <- extract_burn_year_value(
  dats_no_reburn,
  burn_year = dats_no_reburn$burn_year,
  prefix = "cbi_1kmmwstd"
)


# Generate mock_burn_year
dats_no_reburn$mock_burn_year <- dats_no_reburn$burn_year

na_idx <- which(is.na(dats_no_reburn$mock_burn_year))
dats_no_reburn$mock_burn_year[na_idx] <- sample(2000:2020, length(na_idx), replace = TRUE)


# Replace NAs with 0 in specified columns
cols_to_fill <- c("burn_cbi", "burn_cbi_1kmmwmedian", "burn_cbi_1kmmwstd")

for (col in cols_to_fill) {
  dats_no_reburn[[col]][is.na(dats_no_reburn[[col]])] <- 0
}

# Remove the few rows that still have the strange fire but no burn year phenomenon
dats_no_reburn <- dats_no_reburn |>
  filter(!(fire == 1 & is.na(burn_year)))

```



# Get biotic & drought sums and means in time before/after burn
```{r}

transform_annual_to_priorafter <- function(df, column_pattern, summary_fn_name, nyears) {
  # Validate the summary function
  if (!exists(summary_fn_name, mode = "function")) {
    stop("Summary function '", summary_fn_name, "' is not a valid function.")
  }
  summary_fn <- match.fun(summary_fn_name)
  
  # Identify columns matching pattern
  matched_cols <- grep(column_pattern, names(df), value = TRUE)
  if (length(matched_cols) == 0) return(df)
  
  # Extract base name
  base_name <- sub("^(.*?)_\\d{4}$", "\\1", matched_cols[1])
  
  # Map year to column names
  col_years <- as.integer(sub(".*_(\\d{4})$", "\\1", matched_cols))
  col_year_map <- setNames(matched_cols, col_years)
  
  # Initialize result vectors
  n <- nrow(df)
  prior_vals <- rep(NA_real_, n)
  after_vals <- rep(NA_real_, n)
  
  for (i in seq_len(n)) {
    byr <- df$mock_burn_year[i]
    if (!is.na(byr)) {
      # Prior 5 years
      yrs_prior <- (byr - nyears):(byr - 1)
      if (all(yrs_prior %in% col_years)) {
        cols <- col_year_map[as.character(yrs_prior)]
        vals <- unlist(df[i, cols])
        if (!any(is.na(vals))) prior_vals[i] <- summary_fn(vals, na.rm = TRUE)
      }
      
      # After 5 years
      yrs_after <- (byr + 1):(byr + nyears)
      if (all(yrs_after %in% col_years)) {
        cols <- col_year_map[as.character(yrs_after)]
        vals <- unlist(df[i, cols])
        if (!any(is.na(vals))) after_vals[i] <- summary_fn(vals, na.rm = TRUE)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Construct column names with function name
  fn_suffix <- tolower(summary_fn_name)
  prior_col <- paste0(base_name, "_", nyears, "_yrs_prior_", fn_suffix)
  after_col <- paste0(base_name, "_", nyears, "_yrs_after_", fn_suffix)
  
  df[[prior_col]] <- prior_vals
  df[[after_col]] <- after_vals
  
  # Filter out rows where either summary column is NA
  df <- df[!is.na(df[[prior_col]]) & !is.na(df[[after_col]]), ]
  
  return(df)
}


n_beyond_threshold_x_yrs <- function(df, column_pattern, nyears, threshold) {
  # Validate and parse the threshold expression
  threshold_fn <- tryCatch(
    {
      eval(parse(text = paste0("function(x) x", threshold)))
    },
    error = function(e) stop("Invalid threshold expression: ", threshold)
  )
  
  # Identify columns matching the pattern
  matched_cols <- grep(column_pattern, names(df), value = TRUE)
  if (length(matched_cols) == 0) return(df)
  
  # Extract base name and year info
  base_name <- sub("^(.*?)_\\d{4}$", "\\1", matched_cols[1])
  col_years <- as.integer(sub(".*_(\\d{4})$", "\\1", matched_cols))
  col_year_map <- setNames(matched_cols, col_years)
  
  # Initialize result vectors
  n <- nrow(df)
  prior_counts <- integer(n)
  after_counts <- integer(n)
  
  for (i in seq_len(n)) {
    byr <- df$mock_burn_year[i]
    if (!is.na(byr)) {
      # Prior years
      yrs_prior <- (byr - nyears):(byr - 1)
      if (all(yrs_prior %in% col_years)) {
        cols <- col_year_map[as.character(yrs_prior)]
        vals <- unlist(df[i, cols])
        prior_counts[i] <- sum(threshold_fn(vals), na.rm = TRUE)
      } else {
        prior_counts[i] <- NA_integer_
      }
      
      # After years
      yrs_after <- (byr + 1):(byr + nyears)
      if (all(yrs_after %in% col_years)) {
        cols <- col_year_map[as.character(yrs_after)]
        vals <- unlist(df[i, cols])
        after_counts[i] <- sum(threshold_fn(vals), na.rm = TRUE)
      } else {
        after_counts[i] <- NA_integer_
      }
    } else {
      prior_counts[i] <- NA_integer_
      after_counts[i] <- NA_integer_
    }
  }
  
  # Create new column names
  prior_col <- paste0(base_name, "_", nyears, "_yrs_prior_threshold")
  after_col <- paste0(base_name, "_", nyears, "_yrs_after_threshold")
  
  # Append to df
  df[[prior_col]] <- prior_counts
  df[[after_col]] <- after_counts
  
  return(df)
}


dats_simple_added <- transform_annual_to_priorafter(
  df = dats_no_reburn,
  column_pattern = "^biotic_\\d{4}$",
  summary_fn_name = "sum",
  nyears = 5
)

dats_simple_added <- transform_annual_to_priorafter(
  df = dats_simple_added,
  column_pattern = "^hd_fingerprint_\\d{4}$",
  summary_fn_name = "sum",
  nyears = 5
)

dats_simple_added <- transform_annual_to_priorafter(
  df = dats_simple_added,
  column_pattern = "^hd_fingerprint_\\d{4}$",
  summary_fn_name = "mean",
  nyears = 5
)

dats_simple_added <- transform_annual_to_priorafter(
  df = dats_simple_added,
  column_pattern = "^pdsi_annual_\\d{4}$",
  summary_fn_name = "sum",
  nyears = 5
)

dats_simple_added <- transform_annual_to_priorafter(
  df = dats_simple_added,
  column_pattern = "^pdsi_annual_\\d{4}$",
  summary_fn_name = "mean",
  nyears = 5
)

dats_simple_added <- transform_annual_to_priorafter(
  df = dats_simple_added,
  column_pattern = "^pdsi_summer_\\d{4}$",
  summary_fn_name = "sum",
  nyears = 5
)

dats_simple_added <- transform_annual_to_priorafter(
  df = dats_simple_added,
  column_pattern = "^pdsi_summer_\\d{4}$",
  summary_fn_name = "mean",
  nyears = 5
)



# Add thresholded data
dats_simple_added <- n_beyond_threshold_x_yrs(
  df = dats_simple_added,
  column_pattern = "^pdsi_annual_\\d{4}$",
  nyears = 5,
  threshold = "<=-400"
)

dats_simple_added <- n_beyond_threshold_x_yrs(
  df = dats_simple_added,
  column_pattern = "^pdsi_summer_\\d{4}$",
  nyears = 5,
  threshold = "<=-400"
)

dats_simple_added <- n_beyond_threshold_x_yrs(
  df = dats_simple_added,
  column_pattern = "^pdsi_annual_\\d{4}$",
  nyears = 5,
  threshold = "<=-300"
)

dats_simple_added <- n_beyond_threshold_x_yrs(
  df = dats_simple_added,
  column_pattern = "^pdsi_summer_\\d{4}$",
  nyears = 5,
  threshold = "<=-300"
)

dats_simple_added <- n_beyond_threshold_x_yrs(
  df = dats_simple_added,
  column_pattern = "^hd_fingerprint_\\d{4}$",
  nyears = 5,
  threshold = ">=6"
)


# hist(dats_simple_added$hd_fingerprint_5_yrs_prior_threshold)
# hist(dats_simple_added$hd_fingerprint_5_yrs_after_threshold)
# hist(dats_simple_added$pdsi_annual_5_yrs_prior_threshold)
# hist(dats_simple_added$pdsi_annual_5_yrs_after_threshold)

```


# Deal with RAP data


- change functions to be named as 'forest_cover_response'
- fix post-fire slope to ignore the two years post fire

```{r}

compute_forest_response_offset <- function(dt, offsets, new_col_name, prefix = "rap_TRE_") {
  # Ensure dt is a data.table
  dt <- as.data.table(copy(dt))
  dt[, id__temp := .I]  # Create unique ID for merge

  # Melt relevant columns
  melt_cols <- grep(paste0("^", prefix, "\\d{4}$"), names(dt), value = TRUE)

  long_dt <- melt(
    dt,
    id.vars = c("id__temp", "mock_burn_year"),
    measure.vars = melt_cols,
    variable.name = "year_col",
    value.name = "value"
  )

  # Extract year from column name
  long_dt[, year := as.integer(sub(prefix, "", year_col))]

  # Calculate offset from burn year
  long_dt[, offset := year - mock_burn_year]

  # Only keep rows with desired offsets
  long_dt <- long_dt[offset %in% offsets]

  # Now, summarize carefully
  summary_dt <- long_dt[, .(
    n_available = sum(!is.na(value)),
    n_expected = length(offsets),
    avg = if (sum(!is.na(value)) == length(offsets)) mean(value, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_
  ), by = id__temp]

  # Keep only id and avg
  summary_dt <- summary_dt[, .(id__temp, avg)]

  # Merge back
  dt <- merge(dt, summary_dt, by = "id__temp", all.x = TRUE)
  setnames(dt, "avg", new_col_name)
  dt[, id__temp := NULL]

  return(as_tibble(dt))
}


#' Compute Post-Fire Forest Trend Slope from forest cover Time Series
#'
#' This function calculates the slope and R-squared value of a thiel-sen regression
#' fitted to post-fire remote sensing time series data (e.g., RAP TRE) over
#' specified year offsets. The output includes the computed slope and R² for each
#' observation where sufficient data is available.
#'
#' @param dt A `data.table` or `data.frame` containing RAP data and a `burn_year` column.
#' @param offsets Integer vector indicating year offsets from `burn_year` to include in the slope calculation. Defaults to `2:10`.
#' @param req_yrs Integer indicating the minimum number of non-NA observations required to fit a regression. Defaults to `5`.
#' @param new_col_name Name of the column to store computed slope values. Defaults to `"post_fire_rap_slope"`.
#' @param r2_col_name Name of the column to store R-squared values. Defaults to `"post_fire_rap_r2"`.
#' @param prefix Prefix of column names containing yearly RAP values. These should be named like `prefixYYYY` (e.g., `"rap_TRE_2012"`).
#'
#' @return A `tibble` with the original data and two additional columns containing slope and R-squared values.
#'
#' @details
#' The function internally melts the RAP time series into long format, filters values
#' by offset from the `mock_burn_year`, and fits a thiel-sen model (`value ~ offset`) for each
#' row. If the number of non-NA years is below `req_yrs`, NA values are returned.
#'
#' @importFrom data.table as.data.table copy melt setnames
#' @importFrom stats lm coef summary
#' @importFrom tibble as_tibble
#'
#' @examples
#' \dontrun{
#' dt <- data.table(
#'   burn_year = c(2010, 2012),
#'   rap_TRE_2011 = c(0.5, 0.6),
#'   rap_TRE_2012 = c(0.6, 0.65),
#'   rap_TRE_2013 = c(0.7, NA),
#'   rap_TRE_2014 = c(0.8, 0.75)
#' )
#' compute_post_fire_forest_slope_dt(dt, offsets = 1:4, req_yrs = 3)
#' }
#'
#' @export
compute_post_fire_forest_slope_dt <- function(
  dt,
  offsets = 2:10,
  req_yrs = 5,
  new_col_name = "post_fire_rap_slope",
  r2_col_name = "post_fire_rap_r2",
  prefix = "rap_TRE_"
) {
  dt <- as.data.table(copy(dt))
  dt[, id__temp := .I]  # Unique ID

  # Melt RAP TRE columns
  melt_cols <- grep(paste0("^", prefix, "\\d{4}$"), names(dt), value = TRUE)

  long_dt <- melt(
    dt,
    id.vars = c("id__temp", "mock_burn_year"),
    measure.vars = melt_cols,
    variable.name = "year_col",
    value.name = "value"
  )

  # Extract year
  long_dt[, year := as.integer(sub(prefix, "", year_col))]

  # Calculate offset from burn year
  long_dt[, offset := year - mock_burn_year]

  # Keep only desired offsets
  long_dt <- long_dt[offset %in% offsets]

  # Group and compute slope + R2 if enough data
  slope_dt <- long_dt[
    !is.na(value),
    {
      if (.N >= req_yrs) {
        # model <- lm(value ~ offset, data = .SD) ####################SWITCH TO USE THEIL-SEN REGRESSION
        # list(
        #   slope = coef(model)[["offset"]],
        #   r2 = summary(model)$r.squared
        # )
        model <- mblm::mblm(value ~ offset, data = .SD, repeated = FALSE)
        preds <- predict(model)
        r2 <- 1 - sum((.SD$value - preds)^2, na.rm = TRUE) / sum((.SD$value - mean(.SD$value, na.rm = TRUE))^2, na.rm = TRUE)

        list(
          slope = coef(model)[["offset"]],
          r2 = r2
        )
      } else {
        list(
          slope = NA_real_,
          r2 = NA_real_
        )
      }
    },
    by = id__temp
  ]

  # Merge results back
  dt <- merge(dt, slope_dt, by = "id__temp", all.x = TRUE)
  setnames(dt, c("slope", "r2"), c(new_col_name, r2_col_name))
  dt[, id__temp := NULL]

  return(as_tibble(dt))
}


# Use functions

dats_simple_added <- dats_simple_added %>%
  mutate(
    burn_sev = case_when(
      fire == 1 & burn_cbi >= 2.25 ~ "High",
      fire == 1 & burn_cbi < 0.1 ~ "Negligible",
      fire == 1 & burn_cbi >= 0.1 & burn_cbi < 2.25 ~ "Low/Moderate",
      TRUE ~ "Never"
    )
  )


tic()
dats_response <- dats_simple_added |>
  compute_forest_response_offset(offsets = 4:6,
                                 new_col_name = "avg_rap_TRE_5_yr_post_fire",
                                 prefix = "rap_TRE_") |>
  compute_forest_response_offset(offsets = 9:11,
                                 new_col_name = "avg_rap_TRE_10_yr_post_fire",
                                 prefix = "rap_TRE_") |>
  compute_forest_response_offset(offsets = 14:16,
                                 new_col_name = "avg_rap_TRE_15_yr_post_fire",
                                 prefix = "rap_TRE_") |>
  compute_forest_response_offset(offsets = -7:-5,
                                 new_col_name = "avg_rap_TRE_6_yr_pre_fire",
                                 prefix = "rap_TRE_") |>
  compute_forest_response_offset(offsets = -3:-1,
                                 new_col_name = "avg_rap_TRE_2_yr_pre_fire",
                                 prefix = "rap_TRE_") |>
  compute_forest_response_offset(offsets = 2:4, 
                                 new_col_name = "avg_rap_TRE_3_yr_post_fire",  # USE 3 YRS POST FIRE SO THAT WINDOW CAPTURES 2-4, missing most delayed mortality
                                 prefix = "rap_TRE_")
toc()


# dats_response <- dats_response |>
#   dplyr::mutate(post_fire_forest_difference_3_yr = avg_forest_3_yr_post_fire - avg_forest_2_yr_pre_fire,
#                 post_fire_forest_difference_5_yr = avg_forest_5_yr_post_fire - avg_forest_2_yr_pre_fire,
#                 post_fire_forest_difference_10_yr = avg_forest_10_yr_post_fire - avg_forest_2_yr_pre_fire,
#                 post_fire_forest_difference_15_yr = avg_forest_15_yr_post_fire - avg_forest_2_yr_pre_fire,
#                 perc_recovery_10yr = (post_fire_forest_difference_3_yr - post_fire_forest_difference_10_yr) / post_fire_forest_difference_3_yr * 100,
#                 perc_recovery_15yr = (post_fire_forest_difference_3_yr - post_fire_forest_difference_15_yr) / post_fire_forest_difference_3_yr * 100)

dats_response <- dats_response |>
  dplyr::mutate(post_fire_rap_TRE_difference_n2_3_yr = avg_rap_TRE_3_yr_post_fire - avg_rap_TRE_2_yr_pre_fire,
                post_fire_rap_TRE_difference_n2_5_yr = avg_rap_TRE_5_yr_post_fire - avg_rap_TRE_2_yr_pre_fire,
                post_fire_rap_TRE_difference_n2_10_yr = avg_rap_TRE_10_yr_post_fire - avg_rap_TRE_2_yr_pre_fire,
                post_fire_rap_TRE_difference_n2_15_yr = avg_rap_TRE_15_yr_post_fire - avg_rap_TRE_2_yr_pre_fire,
                post_fire_rap_TRE_difference_n6_3_yr = avg_rap_TRE_3_yr_post_fire - avg_rap_TRE_6_yr_pre_fire,
                post_fire_rap_TRE_difference_n6_5_yr = avg_rap_TRE_5_yr_post_fire - avg_rap_TRE_6_yr_pre_fire,
                post_fire_rap_TRE_difference_n6_10_yr = avg_rap_TRE_10_yr_post_fire - avg_rap_TRE_6_yr_pre_fire,
                post_fire_rap_TRE_difference_n6_15_yr = avg_rap_TRE_15_yr_post_fire - avg_rap_TRE_6_yr_pre_fire,
                post_fire_rap_TRE_increase_3_10_yr = avg_rap_TRE_10_yr_post_fire - avg_rap_TRE_3_yr_post_fire,
                post_fire_rap_TRE_increase_3_15_yr = avg_rap_TRE_15_yr_post_fire - avg_rap_TRE_3_yr_post_fire,
                post_fire_rap_TRE_perc_recovery_n6_3_15_yr = post_fire_rap_TRE_increase_3_15_yr / (-1 * post_fire_rap_TRE_difference_n6_3_yr),
                post_fire_rap_TRE_perc_recovery_n6_3_10_yr = post_fire_rap_TRE_increase_3_10_yr / (-1 * post_fire_rap_TRE_difference_n6_3_yr))


dats_response <- dats_response |>
  # compute_post_fire_forest_slope_dt(
  #   offsets = 5:10,
  #   req_yrs = 5,
  #   new_col_name = "post_fire_rap_TRE_slope_5_10_yrs",
  #   r2_col_name = "post_fire_rap_TRE_5_10_yrs_r2",
  #   prefix = "rap_TRE_") |>
  # compute_post_fire_forest_slope_dt(
  #   offsets = 10:15,
  #   req_yrs = 5,
  #   new_col_name = "post_fire_rap_TRE_slope_10_15_yrs",
  #   r2_col_name = "post_fire_rap_TRE_10_15_yrs_r2",
  #   prefix = "rap_TRE_") |>
  compute_post_fire_forest_slope_dt(
    offsets = 2:5,
    req_yrs = 3,
    new_col_name = "post_fire_rap_TRE_slope_2_5_yrs",
    r2_col_name = "post_fire_rap_TRE_2_5_yrs_r2",
    prefix = "rap_TRE_") |>
  compute_post_fire_forest_slope_dt(
    offsets = 2:10,
    req_yrs = 8,
    new_col_name = "post_fire_rap_TRE_slope_2_10_yrs",
    r2_col_name = "post_fire_rap_TRE_2_10_yrs_r2",
    prefix = "rap_TRE_") |>
  compute_post_fire_forest_slope_dt(
    offsets = 2:15,
    req_yrs = 13,
    new_col_name = "post_fire_rap_TRE_slope_2_15_yrs",
    r2_col_name = "post_fire_rap_TRE_2_15_yrs_r2",
    prefix = "rap_TRE_") |>
  compute_post_fire_forest_slope_dt(
    offsets = 2:20,
    req_yrs = 17,
    new_col_name = "post_fire_rap_TRE_slope_2_20_yrs",
    r2_col_name = "post_fire_rap_TRE_2_20_yrs_r2",
    prefix = "rap_TRE_")




```



# Clean and write short data

```{r}
dats_clean <- dats_response |>
  mutate(uniqueID = row_number()) |> # apply a unique ID to be sure it has one
  remove_columns_with_prefix(prefixes = c("cbi", "distance_unburned"))

#Clean up factors 
dats_clean <- dats_clean |>
  mutate(frg_reclass_desc = case_when(frg_reclass == 1 ~ "<35 return, low/mixed",
                                 frg_reclass == 2 ~ "<35 return, replacement",
                                 frg_reclass == 3 ~ "35-200 return, low/mixed",
                                 frg_reclass == 4 ~ "35-200 return replacement",
                                 frg_reclass == 5 ~ ">200 return any"),
         frg_reclass_desc = as.factor(frg_reclass_desc),
         lf_bps = as.factor(lf_bps),
         burn_sev = fct_relevel(as.factor(burn_sev), c("Never", "Negligible", "Low/Moderate", "High")),
         burn_year = as.integer(burn_year),
         mock_burn_year = as.integer(mock_burn_year))


arrow::write_parquet(x = dats_clean, sink = here(dir_derived, "test_dats_cleaned.parquet"))
#dats_clean <- read_parquet(here(dir_derived, "test_dats_cleaned.parquet"))



# Clean up unnecessary columns
dats_short <- dats_clean |>
  remove_columns_with_prefix(prefixes = c("^pdsi_summer_\\d{4}$",
                                          "^pdsi_annual_\\d{4}$",
                                          "^hd_fingerprint_\\d{4}$",
                                          "^biotic_\\d{4}$",
                                          "rap_TRE"))


arrow::write_parquet(x = dats_short, sink = here(dir_derived, "test_dats_short.parquet"))



# Create gpkg for points

gpkg <- dats_short |>
  select(uniqueID, lat, long, ecoregion) |>
  st_as_sf(
    coords = c("long", "lat"),
    crs = 4326,
    remove = FALSE
  )

sf::st_write(gpkg, here(dir_derived, "test_dats_sf.gpkg"), append = FALSE)

```


# Long data
```{r}
dats_long <- dats_clean |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = matches("_(19|20)\\d{2}$"),        # ends with a 4-digit year
    names_to = c(".value", "year"),           # .value = "pdsi_summer", "vpd_fall", ...
    names_pattern = "(.*)_(\\d{4})"           # capture "pdsi_summer" and the year
  ) |>
  mutate(year = as.integer(year)) |>
  mutate(year_from_fire_index = year - mock_burn_year,
         fire_timeframe = ifelse(year_from_fire_index < 0, "before_burn", ifelse(year_from_fire_index > 0, "after_burn", "year_of_burn")),
         treated = ifelse(year_from_fire_index >= 0 & fire == 1, 1, 0))

tic()
arrow::write_parquet(x = dats_long, sink = here(dir_derived, "test_dats_long.parquet"))
toc()

```





<button class="accordion-button" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#collapseOne" >Click to see Session Information</button><div id="collapseOne" class="accordion-collapse collapse"><div>

```{r sessionInfo}
sessionInfo()
```

</div></div>
